reasoning: Reject — wrong domain entirely. This candidate is a Facilities and Transportation Operations professional with nine years in corporate transport logistics, vendor management, and office administration. There is zero overlap with the SW Developer role requiring C programming, MISRA coding guidelines, AUTOSAR, RTOS, and RADAR system knowledge. Not a single technical software or embedded systems skill appears anywhere in the resume. This is a complete domain mismatch — do not spend any further recruiter time on this candidate for this role.
strengths: TRANSPORT OPS LEADERSHIP: Nine years of progressive leadership in facilities and transport management, scaling to Team Lead level managing 4000+ employees' transportation at Cognizant with GPS/GPRS fleet tracking.
VENDOR AND COMPLIANCE MANAGEMENT: Demonstrated end-to-end MIS, billing audits, EHS compliance, and multi-vendor coordination across multiple enterprise clients — strong operational discipline.
TEAM LEADERSHIP: Currently operating as Team Lead at Ventra Health covering manpower management, training, budgeting, and health/safety compliance — genuine people leadership experience.
gaps: ZERO EMBEDDED SOFTWARE SKILLS: The role mandates C programming, MISRA coding, AUTOSAR, and RTOS — none of these appear anywhere in the candidate's resume. This is a hard disqualifier with no path to remedy.

WRONG DOMAIN ENTIRELY: Candidate's entire career is in facilities management and corporate transport logistics, not embedded systems or automotive software development. There is no relevant experience to evaluate for this JD.

scoring_factors.reason: No notice period stated and JD does not specify a maximum — no penalty applied.
Candidate location is not stated in the resume — cannot confirm Chennai match but no explicit mismatch either.
Candidate has 9 years total experience, well above the minimum threshold — no penalty on tenure grounds.
JD gender preference is 'Any' — no penalty applied.
No college preference or exclusion specified in the JD — no penalty applied.

hard_filter_failures: Wrong domain — no embedded software or relevant technical skills matching the JD requirements
availability_reason: Latest role at Ventra Health listed end date as March 2026 — candidate appears to be between roles currently.
self_reported_unverified: Claims to have managed transportation for 4000 employees 24x7 at Cognizant — scale is notable but no supporting metrics on cost savings or efficiency improvement are provided.
Team Lead title at Ventra Health with end date of March 2026 listed — future end date raises authenticity questions about whether role has actually concluded.
interview_flags: Clarify why the Ventra Health role end date is listed as March 2026 — is the candidate currently employed or has the role already ended?
Ask why this candidate applied for a software developer role — possible misapplication or incorrect resume submitted.
Probe any technical background — does the candidate have any hidden software or engineering education not reflected in resume?
Gap between Oct 2017 and present shows continuous employment but verify actual reasons for each transition.
B.Com Computers degree — clarify whether this included any programming coursework relevant to embedded systems.
